allow: PowerShell($tries = 0; while \($tries -lt 30\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:3010/api/health -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "ready"; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; $tries++ }; if \($tries -ge 30\) { Write-Host "timeout" })

PowerShell($tries = 0; while \($tries -lt 20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:3011/api/health -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "ready"; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; $tries++ }; if \($tries -ge 20\) { "timeout" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:1420 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "vite up: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "vite down: $_" })
